Next Generation Communication Technologies and Industry 4.0 Applications

20
						December

2024

Within the scope of Winter Technology Talks'24, organized in cooperation with Engineering and Natural Sciences Faculty, OPINA and UTAS, don't miss the opportunity to listen to the next generation communication Technologies and industry 4.0 applications with the presentation of TURKCELL Technology representative Dr. Gökhan Kalem, Şerife Çağla Özgöç, Fatih Dartıcı, Gözde Pourkarimi!

📅 Date: Thursday, December 26, 2024

📍 Location: Ramazan Nejat Tuncay Conference Hall, Okan University
